sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34877" key="e)napasxole/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐναπ-ασχολέω</orth>, <sense id="n34877.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be wholly occupied in</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0724.tlg002:1:134D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Steph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Hp.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.134D.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
